page.title: Jet Ski Rental Malaga | Boat Rental Marbella

data.meta_description: Book jet ski rental Malaga from Puerto Banús, Marbella. Sea-Doo GTX from €749/2h, skipper & drinks included. Ride the Costa del Sol today.
data.summary: Jet ski rental in Malaga from Puerto Banús, Marbella. Our Sea-Doo GTX departs from Puerto Banús, includes skipper, fuel, drinks, and insurance. Starting at €749 for 2 hours.

2-hour rental from €749 (skipper, fuel, drinks, insurance, IVA included)

faq.q: Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Malaga?
faq.a: No. Every jet ski rental from Boat Rental Marbella includes a licensed skipper who handles the controls. You can ride as a passenger or enjoy the thrill from the back. The skipper ensures safety and navigates the best spots along the Costa del Sol.

faq.q: How much does jet ski rental cost in Malaga?
faq.a: Our Sea-Doo GTX jet ski starts at €749 for 2 hours and goes up to €2,299 for a full 8-hour day. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees. Book via WhatsApp for custom durations.

faq.q: Where does the jet ski depart from in Malaga?
faq.a: All our jet ski rentals depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella – the most famous marina on the Costa del Sol. From there, you can cruise along the coast to Cabopino, Cala del Faro, or even head toward Estepona. The skipper will tailor the route to your preferences.

faq.q: How many people can ride on the jet ski?
faq.a: The Sea-Doo GTX accommodates up to 3 passengers including the skipper. That means you and one or two friends or family members can enjoy the ride together. Perfect for small groups or couples looking for an adrenaline boost on the water.

faq.q: What is included in the jet ski charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA. You just bring your swimsuit and sunscreen. Everything else is taken care of.

faq.q: Can I get a free jet ski with a boat charter?
faq.a: Yes. When you book a Tier B boat like the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 passengers) for a minimum 4-hour charter, a jet ski is included free of charge. It's a fantastic way to combine luxury cruising with high-speed water fun. Check our fleet page for details.

faq.q: What is the best time of year for jet ski rental in Malaga?
faq.a: The Costa del Sol enjoys over 300 sunny days a year. The peak season runs from May to October when sea temperatures range from 18°C to 26°C. Spring and autumn offer calm seas and fewer crowds. Winter charters are also possible on calm days.

faq.q: How do I book a jet ski in Malaga?
faq.a: Booking is simple. Visit our website, choose your preferred date and duration, and send us a WhatsApp message. We'll confirm availability and send you a secure payment link. For last-minute bookings, WhatsApp is the fastest way to secure your slot.

data.body_html:
Looking for jet ski rental Malaga? Skip the queues and book a Sea-Doo GTX from Puerto Banús, Marbella. Our jet ski charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and full insurance – starting from €749 for 2 hours. No licence needed, no hidden costs. Just pure adrenaline on the Costa del Sol.

Why Choose Boat Rental Marbella for Jet Ski Rental Malaga?

We operate from Puerto Banús, the most iconic marina on the Costa del Sol. Our Sea-Doo GTX is a 3.4-metre, 3-passenger jet ski that delivers thrilling speed and agility. Every charter includes a professional skipper, so you can focus on the ride. We also include unlimited soft drinks, beer, wine, cava, and light snacks – all covered in the price. No surprises.

Jet Ski Rental Malaga: Pricing & Options

DurationPrice (incl. all)Passengers
2 hours€749Up to 3
4 hours€1,499Up to 3
6 hours€1,899Up to 3
8 hours (full day)€2,299Up to 3

All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% Spanish IVA. For custom durations or group bookings, contact us via WhatsApp.

What's Included in Your Jet Ski Charter

  • Licensed English-speaking skipper
  • Fuel for the entire trip
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks (chips, olives, nuts)
  • Full insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%) – no hidden fees

Explore the Malaga Coastline by Jet Ski

Depart from Puerto Banús and ride along the Golden Mile toward Cabopino or head west to Cala del Faro and Estepona. Your skipper knows the best spots for speed runs, calm coves, and photo stops. You can also venture to the Marbella Marina or even Sotogrande for a longer trip. The coastline offers stunning views of La Concha mountain and the Mediterranean.

Free Jet Ski with Boat Charter

If you're chartering a larger vessel, check out our Tier B boats like the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 passengers). Book a minimum 4-hour charter and a jet ski is included free of charge. It's the ultimate combo – luxury cruising plus high-speed water fun. Browse our fleet for more details.

How to Book Your Jet Ski Rental Malaga

Booking is straightforward. Visit our website, select your preferred date and duration, and send us a WhatsApp message. We'll confirm availability and send a secure payment link. For last-minute bookings, WhatsApp is the fastest way. We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance, especially during peak season (May–October).

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Malaga?

No. Every jet ski rental from Boat Rental Marbella includes a licensed skipper who handles the controls. You can ride as a passenger or enjoy the thrill from the back. The skipper ensures safety and navigates the best spots along the Costa del Sol.

How much does jet ski rental cost in Malaga?

Our Sea-Doo GTX jet ski starts at €749 for 2 hours and goes up to €2,299 for a full 8-hour day. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees. Book via WhatsApp for custom durations.

Where does the jet ski depart from in Malaga?

All our jet ski rentals depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella – the most famous marina on the Costa del Sol. From there, you can cruise along the coast to Cabopino, Cala del Faro, or even head toward Estepona. The skipper will tailor the route to your preferences.

How many people can ride on the jet ski?

The Sea-Doo GTX accommodates up to 3 passengers including the skipper. That means you and one or two friends or family members can enjoy the ride together. Perfect for small groups or couples looking for an adrenaline boost on the water.

What is included in the jet ski charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA. You just bring your swimsuit and sunscreen. Everything else is taken care of.

Can I get a free jet ski with a boat charter?

Yes. When you book a Tier B boat like the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 passengers) for a minimum 4-hour charter, a jet ski is included free of charge. It's a fantastic way to combine luxury cruising with high-speed water fun. Check our fleet page for details.

What is the best time of year for jet ski rental in Malaga?

The Costa del Sol enjoys over 300 sunny days a year. The peak season runs from May to October when sea temperatures range from 18°C to 26°C. Spring and autumn offer calm seas and fewer crowds. Winter charters are also possible on calm days.

How do I book a jet ski in Malaga?

Booking is simple. Visit our website, choose your preferred date and duration, and send us a WhatsApp message. We'll confirm availability and send you a secure payment link. For last-minute bookings, WhatsApp is the fastest way to secure your slot.
